reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 30-Night Southeast Asia Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 30-Night Southeast Asia Explorer and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 30-Night Southeast Asia Explorer | Disney Fantasy | Disney Cruise Line
seo.metaDescription: Book a 30-night Southeast Asia cruise onboard Disney Fantasy of Disney Cruise Line. Visiting Singapore, Penang (George Town), Phuket. Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
